markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, imagery, CTAs, and key product features.](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to incorporate AI-generated imagery for article headers, aiming for a style consistent with Superhuman's brand](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [CTAs will be tailored based on content funnel stage, moving away from generic "Try Superhuman" for top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Superhuman is shifting messaging from "AI-powered" to "AI-native", requiring updates across all content](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Key Superhuman features to highlight: AI capabilities, split inbox, reminders, team collaboration, and keyboard shortcuts](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

## Topics

### Content Imagery Strategy

  - [GrowthX can now generate unique images based on article content using AI tools like Recraft](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Superhuman prefers bold, striking imagery similar to their "inbox zero" visuals](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Action: Superhuman to send \~10 preferred images as inspiration for GrowthX to create samples](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Call-to-Action (CTA) Approach

  - [Current CTAs ("Try Superhuman", "Drop us a line") may be too low-funnel for some content](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Need for funnel-stage appropriate CTAs (e.g., product info pages for top-of-funnel content)](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop 2-3 CTA options with different destinations based on content type](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [CTAs will be added during CMS publishing, not built into the content itself](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)

### Superhuman Messaging and Feature Highlights

  - [Shifting from "AI-powered" to "AI-native" messaging across all content](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Key features to emphasize:](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
    1.  Superhuman AI: Auto labels, auto drafts, Ask AI, Write with AI
    2.  Split inbox (including new AI-based splitting)
    3.  Reminders
    4.  Team comments and shared threads
    5.  Keyboard shortcuts
    6.  Integrations (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive for sales-focused content)
    7.  Smart Send (AI-powered send time optimization)

### Content Review Process

  - [Superhuman's copywriter/managing editor to be looped in for additional style feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [GrowthX to pay special attention to Superhuman-specific language (e.g., "conversations" instead of "email threads")](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Feedback on product terminology and capitalization is crucial, but GrowthX can push back on non-essential edits](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Superhuman to send preferred imagery samples to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [GrowthX to create and send image samples based on Superhuman's style](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Develop 2-3 CTA options for different funnel stages](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Update all content to reflect "AI-native" messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [GrowthX to send more content pieces for review in the coming days](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Superhuman team to review recent articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Consider setting up Superhuman product access for GrowthX team to better understand features](https://fathom.video/share/Js2XxMCbkPbNgxpbjQg8zqz142oMstQU?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
